Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Advocate]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 6''' — Advocates are a group that Moonmaster belongs to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 7''' — The Advocates are a group that arrests people and protects the galaxy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — Blue is one of the colors used by the Advocates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — The Advocate was backed up by Voidhoppers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 40''' — Clockworker is an Advocate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 43''' — The witch Advocate was standing back-to-back with a swordsman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 44''' — Undermaker is an Advocate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 47''' — Mell is to be turned over to Advocate custody.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Advocate is an entity that keeps evidence.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
